output.code:
# Read the provided text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-BnsSuvurxBqx6xFuKSu2QP-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:4000]

# Identify positions of all double quotes
quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
len(quote_positions), quote_positions[:20], quote_positions[-10:]

# Pair them: assume quotes come in pairs sequentially
spans = []
for i in range(0, len(quote_positions)-1, 2):
    start_quote = quote_positions[i]
    end_quote = quote_positions[i+1]
    spans.append((start_quote+1, end_quote))  # exclude quotes
len(spans), spans[:5], spans[-5:]

quotes = [text[s:e] for s,e in spans]
quotes

ولا تبخسوا الناس أشياءهم ولا تعثوا في الأرض مفسدين
فأخذتهم الرجفة فأصبحوا في دارهم جاثمين
ولقد أرسلنا شعيبًا إلى قومه فقال يا قوم اعبدوا الله ما لكم من إله غيره
Quran Arabic Aya ولا تبخسوا الناس أشياءهم
الرَّجْفَةُ فَأَصْبَحُوا فِي دَارِهِمْ جَاثِمِينَ quran

output.code:
entries = []
for (s,e) in spans:
    span_text = text[s:e]
    context_start = max(0, s-60)
    context = text[context_start:s]
    entries.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": span_text, "context": context})
entries

import json

# Helper function to set entry fields
def make_entry(span_start, span_end, span_text, citation_type, is_valid, aya_ref=None, hadith_ref=None, corrected_text=None, completely_invalid=False):
    return {
        "span_start": span_start,
        "span_end": span_end,
        "span_text": span_text,
        "citation_type": citation_type,
        "is_valid": is_valid,
        "aya_reference": aya_ref or {},
        "hadeeth_reference": hadith_ref or {},
        "corrected_text": corrected_text if corrected_text is not None else "",
        "completely_invalid": completely_invalid
    }

entries_out = []

# 1
s,e,txt = spans[0][0], spans[0][1], quotes[0]
entries_out.append(make_entry(
    s,e,txt,
    "Aya",
    is_valid=False,
    aya_ref={"sura_name":"هود","sura_number":11,"aya_number":85},
    corrected_text="وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا النَّاسَ أَشْيَاءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا فِي الْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ",
    completely_invalid=False
))

# 2
s,e,txt = spans[1][0], spans[1][1], quotes[1]
entries_out.append(make_entry(
    s,e,txt,
    "Aya",
    is_valid=False,
    aya_ref={"sura_name":"الأعراف","sura_number":7,"aya_number":85},
    corrected_text="وَإِلَىٰ مَدْيَنَ أَخَاهُمْ شُعَيْبًا ۚ قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ مَا لَكُمْ مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرُهُ ۖ قَدْ جَاءَتْكُمْ بَيِّنَةٌ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ ۖ فَأَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ وَالْمِيزَانَ وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا النَّاسَ أَشْيَاءَهُمْ وَلَا تُفْسِدُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلَاحِهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ",
    completely_invalid=False
))

# 3
s,e,txt = spans[2][0], spans[2][1], quotes[2]
entries_out.append(make_entry(
    s,e,txt,
    "Aya",
    is_valid=False,
    aya_ref={"sura_name":"الأعراف","sura_number":7,"aya_number":91},
    corrected_text="فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الرَّجْفَةُ فَأَصْبَحُوا فِي دَارِهِمْ جَاثِمِينَ",
    completely_invalid=False
))

# 4 - hadith (Musnad Ahmad, not in six)
s,e,txt = spans[3][0], spans[3][1], quotes[3]
entries_out.append(make_entry(
    s,e,txt,
    "Hadeeth",
    is_valid=False,
    hadeeth_ref={}, # unknown
    corrected_text="خطأ",
    completely_invalid=True
))

# 5 - ambiguous ayah; mark invalid unknown
s,e,txt = spans[4][0], spans[4][1], quotes[4]
entries_out.append(make_entry(
    s,e,txt,
    "Aya",
    is_valid=False,
    aya_ref={}, # unknown due to uncertainty
    corrected_text="خطأ",
    completely_invalid=True
))

# 6 - hadith likely in Musnad Ahmad; mark invalid
s,e,txt = spans[5][0], spans[5][1], quotes[5]
entries_out.append(make_entry(
    s,e,txt,
    "Hadeeth",
    is_valid=False,
    hadeeth_ref={},
    corrected_text="خطأ",
    completely_invalid=True
))

# 7 - correction to Al-Imran 11
s,e,txt = spans[6][0], spans[6][1], quotes[6]
entries_out.append(make_entry(
    s,e,txt,
    "Aya",
    is_valid=False,
    aya_ref={"sura_name":"آل عمران","sura_number":3,"aya_number":11},
    corrected_text="كَدَأْبِ آلِ فِرْعَوْنَ وَالَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ كَذَّبُوا بِآيَاتِنَا فَأَخَذَهُمُ اللَّهُ بِذُنُوبِهِمْ ۗ وَاللَّهُ شَدِيدُ الْعِقَابِ",
    completely_invalid=False
))

# 8-20 identical aya; mark as valid
for i in range(7, 20):
    s,e,txt = spans[i][0], spans[i][1], quotes[i]
    entries_out.append(make_entry(
        s,e,txt,
        "Aya",
        is_valid=True,
        aya_ref={"sura_name":"الأعراف","sura_number":7,"aya_number":91},
        corrected_text=txt,
        completely_invalid=False
    ))

print(len(entries_out))
print(json.dumps(entries_out[0], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
